message:
✨ Add daily install conversion rate line to Daily Active Users chart (#2592)

Adds a green dashed "Conv. Rate %" line on a secondary Y-axis (0-100%)
to the Daily Active Users & Sessions chart. Shows the daily ratio of
agent-connected users to active users, giving a time-series view of
install conversion alongside traffic volume.

New GA4 query fetches daily ksc_agent_connected users; the rate is
computed client-side as (agentConnected / activeUsers) * 100 per day.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
